steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content:
First, combine like terms in the given expression \( 3x^2 - 5x + 6x - 10 \).
The expression simplifies to $ 3x^2 + x - 10 $.

steps.title: Check each factor
steps.content:
• To check if a given expression is a factor of \( 3x^2 + x - 10 \), substitute the root from each choice into the quadratic.
  • For choice C ($x = \frac{5}{3}$ from setting $ 3x-5=0 $):
    Substitute $ x = \frac{5}{3} $ into \( 3x^2 + x - 10 \): $$ 3\left(\frac{5}{3}\right)^2 + \frac{5}{3} - 10 = 3\cdot\frac{25}{9} + \frac{5}{3} - 10 = \frac{75}{9} + \frac{15}{9} - \frac{90}{9} = 0 $$
    Since $ 3x^2 + x - 10 = 0 $ when \( x = \frac{5}{3} \), C is correct.
